member.summary: Execute a query asynchronously using Task.
member.typeparam: The type of result to return.
member.param: The session to query on.
The query object to execute.
The command timeout (in seconds).
The type of command to execute.
An optional token to cancel the asynchronous operation. The default value is .

member.name: T:Byndyusoft.Data.Relational.IDbSessionAccessor
member.summary: Provides access to the current , if one is available.

member.name: P:Byndyusoft.Data.Relational.IDbSessionAccessor.DbSession
member.summary: Gets the current . Returns null if there is no active .

member.name: T:Byndyusoft.Data.Relational.IDbSessionFactory
member.summary: Represents a set of methods for creating instances of database sessions.

member.name: M:Byndyusoft.Data.Relational.IDbSessionFactory.CreateSessionAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns a new instance of the database session's class that implements the interface.
member.param: An optional token to cancel the asynchronous operation. The default value is .

member.name: M:Byndyusoft.Data.Relational.IDbSessionFactory.CreateCommittableSessionAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns a new instance of the commitable database session's class that implements the interface.
member.param: An optional token to cancel the asynchronous operation. The default value is .

member.name: M:Byndyusoft.Data.Relational.IDbSessionFactory.CreateCommittableSessionAsync(System.Data.IsolationLevel,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns a new instance of the commitable database session's class that implements the interface with specified .
member.param: One of the enumeration values that specifies the isolation level for the transaction to use.
An optional token to cancel the asynchronous operation. The default value is .

member.returns: A new instance of the class.
